title: I mapped 14 agents. I'm sharing all of it!
dek: I spend 4 hours every single day diving into new AI tools, frameworks, and research. That’s 20 hours a week of pure learning time. Most people don’t have that.

title: Self-Improving AI Agents & Live Workshop
dek: AI is rewriting how companies get built, how decisions get made, who leads the next decade. Most people are watching it happen to them. I want women running it.

title: Prompt to Extract Your Origin Story (and upcoming AI Agent Workshop)
dek: I’ve watched thousands of founders try to sell something.

title: Saftey is Sexy with AI Agents - NY Tech Week Events!
dek: Most of us are in one of two camps with AI. Avoiding it and still doing admin at 11pm. Or all in, connected to everything, nervously checking what it actually did.
